<?php namespace Spatie\LaravelIgnition\Solutions; use Spatie\ErrorSolutions\Solutions\Laravel\SuggestUsingMariadbDatabaseSolution as BaseSuggestUsingMariadbDatabaseSolutionAlias; use Spatie\Ignition\Contracts\Solution; class SuggestUsingMariadbDatabaseSolution extends BaseSuggestUsingMariadbDatabaseSolutionAlias implements Solution { }
